zh.lifeSummary: 當Daniel Gorsuch於1568年4月19日出生在英國素可波托爾福斯時，他的父親William Gorsuch28歲，母親Avice Hillson26歲。他於1599年4月30日與Alice Hall在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 埃德蒙 馮 金 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 阿可斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和14個女兒的父母。他去世於1638年10月16日在英國賀特福爾瓦爾可享年70歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾瓦爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Daniel Gorsuch于1568年4月19日出生在英国素可波托爾福斯时，他的父亲William Gorsuch28岁，母亲Avice Hillson26岁。他于1599年4月30日与Alice Hall在英国英格兰倫敦聖 埃德蒙 馮 金 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 阿可斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和14个女儿的父母。他去世于1638年10月16日在英国賀特福爾瓦爾可享年70岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾瓦爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Gorsuch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the hamlet of Gorsuch, Lancashire, earlier Gosefordsich, from Old English Gōsford ‘goose ford’ + sīc ‘small stream’.
History: This name is first recorded as that of a manor near Ormskirk held by Walter de Gosefordsich in the late 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Daniel Gorsuch was born on 19 April 1568, in Botolphs, Sussex, England, his father, William Gorsuch, was 28 and his mother, Avice Hillson, was 26. He married Alice Hall on 30 April 1599, in St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 14 daughters. He died on 16 October 1638, in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Daniel Gorsuch est né le 19 avril 1568, à Botolphs, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William Gorsuch, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Avice Hillson, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice Hall le 30 avril 1599, à St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 14 filles. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1638, à Walkern, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Walkern, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Daniel Gorsuch am 19. April 1568 in Botolphs, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Gorsuch 28 und seine Mutter Avice Hillson 26. Er hat am 30. April 1599 in St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, England, United Kingdom Alice Hall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 14 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1638 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel Gorsuch è nato il il 19 aprile 1568 nel Botolphs, Sussex, England, il suo padre, William Gorsuch, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Avice Hillson, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alice Hall il 30 aprile 1599, nel St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 14 figlie. Morì il 16 ottobre 1638, nel Walkern, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Walkern, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Daniel Gorsuchが1568年4月19日にイギリススセックスボトルフスで生まれた時，父William Gorsuchは28歳，母Avice Hillsonは26歳であった。1599年4月30日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト エドムンド ス キング ウィス スト ニチオラス アコンスでAlice Hallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と14人の娘の親であった。彼は1638年10月16日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウォーケルンで70歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアウォーケルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Walbrook St Stephen's Church, London, En: 영국 런던 월브룩 스트 스테프'스 c후르치
ko.St Edmund Acons, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 에드먼드 테 킨그 위스 스트 닉홀아스 악스
ko.lifeSummary: Daniel Gorsuch(이)가 1568년 4월 19일 영국 수세스 벗프스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Gorsuch(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice Hillson(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1599년 4월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 에드먼드 테 킨그 위스 스트 닉홀아스 악스에서 Alice Hall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1638년 10월 16일 영국 허트퍼드실르 워커에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 워커에 묻혔다.

pt.19 April 1568–16 October 1638: 19 de abril de 1568–16 de outubro de 1638

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel Gorsuch nasceu em 19 de abril de 1568, em Botolphs, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Gorsuch, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Avice Hillson, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Hall em 30 de abril de 1599, em St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 14 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1638, em Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Daniel Gorsuch родился 19 апреля 1568 г. в местности ботолфс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Gorsuch было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice Hillson, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Hall 30 апреля 1599 г. в местности ст эдмунд т кинг вит ст ничолас акунс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 14 дочерей. Он умер 16 октября 1638 г. в местности валкирн, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности валкирн, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Daniel Gorsuch nació el 19 de abril de 1568, en Botolphs, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Gorsuch, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Avice Hillson, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alice Hall el 30 de abril de 1599, en St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 14 hijas. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1638, en Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
